meta.name: The Legend of Etroo
meta.description: A forgotten spirit. A dying forest. A journey to restore what was lost.
meta.prize: A one-of-one Etroo Masterworks gaming PC

props.title: The Legend of Etroo
props.tagline: A forgotten spirit. A dying forest. A journey to restore what was lost.
props.intro: L'hae, the First Tree, has been burned, and the spirit of Etroo wanders the forest in torment. The sacred incantation that could restore balance lies scattered among the elder trees. Each week, a new chapter is unsealed — will you answer the call?

props.body: The fires have been extinguished and the sacred seed has crossed the river safely. Yet Etroo's shrine remains shattered, and the forest continues to weaken.

props.kicker: Each challenge completed will reveal a sacred code word and grant you additional entries toward the final reward…
props.title: A one-of-one creation forged by Ironside Computers.
props.description: Every secret code you uncover is an entry. Collect codes each week as the story unfolds and climb toward the grand prize.
rewards: Grand Prize: a one-of-one Etroo Masterworks gaming PC
Exclusive Legend of Etroo digital art pack for all entrants

items.a: Each week we unseal a new chapter. Read the lore, solve the puzzle or riddle, and uncover a secret code hidden in the chapter.
A new chapter is released every week. Scheduled chapters show a countdown and unlock automatically at their set time.
Solve a chapter's challenge to reveal its secret code (some reveal directly). Submit each code on our Gleam campaign for entries.
Every code you submit earns entries toward the prizes. Some chapters grant bonus entries during their release week.

items.q: Who is eligible for the giveaway?
items.a: The giveaway follows the rules on the Gleam campaign page. Check there for region and age requirements.
The Legend of Etroo runs for 10 weekly chapters. When it concludes, it moves to the Adventure Archive and a new adventure begins.

chapters.title: Of Ash and Ember
story: The destruction of L'hae was only the beginning. Embers smolder deep within the forest floor, waiting for the winds to wake them.
It is up to you now — stop the embers before they reach another Elder Tree.

cta.label: Enter the giveaway with this code

reward.title: Chapter 1 reward
reward.text: Submit EMBER-OATH on Gleam for 5 entries.

chapters.title: The River Guide
story: Beyond the smoke ran a cold silver river, and on it drifted a boatman with eyes like still water. He would carry the sacred seed across — but only for one who could answer the riddle of the current.

puzzle.prompt: I have no voice, yet I sing to every shore. I take, but never keep. I give, but own no store. What am I?
puzzle.success: The boatman bows. 'Cross, then — and guard the seed well.'

cta.label: Enter the giveaway with this code

reward.title: Chapter 2 reward
reward.text: Submit SILVER-FORD on Gleam for 5 entries.

chapters.title: The Vine That Would Not Bloom
story: At the heart of the glade grew a vine of silver thorns, planted in better days to mark the shrine. It had not flowered in a hundred years. The seed must be placed at its root — but the vine guards its soil with a test of true sight.

puzzle.question: The vine shows you three blossoms. Only one is real — the others are illusions woven from moonlight. Which is true?
options: The blossom that casts no shadow
The blossom warm to the touch
The blossom that hums a faint tune
puzzle.success: Warmth means life. The true blossom opens, and the soil softens for the seed.

cta.label: Enter the giveaway with this code

reward.title: Chapter 3 reward
reward.text: Submit THORN-BLOOM on Gleam for 5 entries.

chapters.title: Shrine Fragments
story: You reach the shrine at last — or what remains of it. Five carved runes once held Etroo's name in stone, but the quake of his slumber has scattered them into the moss.
An echo of the old song stirs in your memory. Restore the runes in the order the forest remembers, and the spirit may yet hear his name.

puzzle.prompt: Touch the runes in the order of the rising melody — low to high, as the song climbs toward the light.
puzzle.success: The runes flare gold and lock into the stone. Etroo's name glows once more — and far below, something ancient breathes.

reward.title: Latest chapter reward
reward.text: Submit ETROO-WAKES on Gleam for 10 bonus entries this week.

chapters.title: The Moonlit Path
story: The path forward glimmers only under moonlight. Return when the next moon rises over the glade.

cta.label: Enter the giveaway with this code

meta.name: Toadstool Hollow
meta.description: A mischief of mushroom folk and a missing harvest moon.

props.title: Toadstool Hollow
props.tagline: A mischief of mushroom folk and a missing harvest moon.
props.intro: This adventure has concluded, but the hollow is still open to wander.

chapters.title: The Missing Moon
story: The harvest moon vanished from the hollow's sky overnight.
